name: Landmark Rewards SBI Card PRIME

international: Priority Pass standard membership is complimentary; post the 4 complimentary international lounge visits per year, visit charges apply at the programme's prevailing rate.

milestones.label: 20,000 bonus Reward Points on overall annual retail spends of Rs 5 lakh

milestoneBenefits: 20,000 bonus Reward Points on overall annual retail spends of Rs 5 lakh

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 12,000 bonus Reward Points worth Rs 3,000 on payment of annual fee

renewalBenefitsValued.label: 12,000 Reward Points worth Rs 3,000 on payment of renewal fee

joiningBenefits: 12,000 bonus Reward Points worth Rs 3,000 on payment of annual fee
Reward Points are credited within 30 days of annual fee payment
renewalBenefits: 12,000 Reward Points worth Rs 3,000 on payment of renewal fee
Reward Points are credited within 30 days of renewal fee payment
additionalBenefits: Reward Points can be redeemed instantly at Lifestyle, Home Centre, Spar, Max, Baby Shop, and EasyBuy stores
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel spends from Rs 500 to Rs 3,000, capped at Rs 100 per month

redemption.ecosystemLabel: Lifestyle, Home Centre, Spar, Max, Baby Shop, and EasyBuy stores

salaried: Stable income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location
selfEmployed: Stable business income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location

internalNotes: Audited against official SBI Card product page, Landmark PRIME booklet, customer notice dated 1 Aug 2025, MITC page, and Priority Pass FAQ on 2026-06-08.
W.e.f. 1 Sep 2025, reward accrual on digital gaming platforms or merchants and government related transactions is discontinued for Landmark Rewards SBI Card PRIME.
